headline: Generated result polish: fallback routes now feel like Ryokoplan editorial cards, not temporary output.
focus: Make the generated fallback result visually credible and reduce mixed-language labels.
notes: Reworked the generated fallback result into a more editorial route card.
Replaced mixed English labels with softer Korean labels where visible.
Added result-card bottom spacing so the mobile dock does not cover the generated route.
Kept the v206 loading overlay and fallback generation behavior.
